description: Create a 'Slime' character animation using the Plastic Tool. Draw a filled green blob, generate a mesh, and build a skeleton with at least two bones. Animate the skeleton to produce a squash and stretch deformation over 24 frames. Save the scene file to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/slime_rig.tnz and render the animation as an MP4 to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/slime_idle.mp4.
